title: Fix Write Amplification

tasks.description: Implement append-only write mode for single mutations in GraphStorage - Add appendEntity() and appendRelation() methods that append to file instead of rewriting, implement automatic compaction after threshold
Implement update-in-place for entity modifications - Add updateEntity() method that updates cache in-place and appends new version, deferred compaction
acceptanceCriteria: Benchmark shows 5x+ improvement for single updates

tasks.description: Update EntityManager to use append operations - Modify createEntities() to use appendEntity(), addObservations/setImportance/addTags to use updateEntity()
Update ObservationManager to use append operations - Modify addObservations() to use updateEntity() for each modified entity
Add write performance benchmark tests - Create new test file validating O(1) append operations and compaction behavior
testCases: should add single entity without full rewrite (< 10ms for 1000-entity graph)
should add observation without full rewrite (O(1))
should compact after threshold writes (verify file is clean after)

notes: This sprint addresses the write amplification problem where every mutation rewrites the entire file. After this sprint, add operations are O(1) file appends. Delete operations still require full rewrite which is acceptable for their lower frequency.
